reasoning: Order #000000514 is marked Complete and Shipped with full payment captured ($130.19), but no tracking details or delivery confirmation are visible on the order view. The customer claims the package shows delivered but was not received. Per standard procedure, a 'delivered but not received' claim requires carrier verification or investigation before issuing a refund. Escalating for tracking review and carrier inquiry is appropriate before approving or denying the refund.
